Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

HKFC 22 - Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez

Video.summary: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Video.summary: Coming off of their fights at HK49, Sambath Khun and Tayler Bonogofski meet with Dr. Murray Heber to learn injury recovery and prevention techniques. Khun discusses a shoulder problem and Bonogofski gets advise on how to deal with a serious ankle issue.

Video.summary: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues with more action packed MMA! We kick off this show with a great amateur fight between Dale Tallman and Chris Smeltzer. Following is the Main event of the evening, a professional Light Heavyweight Title Fight between UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace and TUF finalist Dan Spohn. You are in for five rounds of MMA action, so do not miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Artem Frolov v. Talekh Nadzhafadze
Video.grandparentTitle: Finish of the Day - Artem Frolov v. Talekh Nadzhafadze - M-1 Challenge

Image.alt: Finish of the Day - Artem Frolov v. Talekh Nadzhafadze - M-1 Challenge

Finish of the Day - Artem Frolov v. Talekh Nadzhafadze - M-1 Challenge

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4
